summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be addressed per the diff summary metadata, but the actual `generateLetterPDF` code changes are not visible in the provided `pdfGenerator.ts` truncation (it shows `generateParishPDF` styling/branding instead). Several additional, unrequested changes related to “enhanced” PDF branding and project tracking were also made.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/modified “professional” parish-branded PDF generation elements (logo, biblical quote, gradient header styling, and mention of auto-print functionality) that go beyond the requested letter-PDF alignment adjustments.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraints say this is strictly a PDF layout adjustment for the correspondence letter PDF (`generateLetterPDF`) and should not involve broader PDF generator enhancements.
evidence: frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts (truncated): "Enhanced professional PDF generator with parish logo, biblical quote, and auto-print functionality" and extensive branding CSS for `generateParishPDF`

hallucinated_features.description: Updated/introduced broad frontend feature summaries describing many unrelated UI changes (budget/event/parishioner dialogs, dashboard filters/pagination, new Korespondencja sidebar section, etc.).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; the request is narrowly scoped to adjusting correspondence letter PDF layout.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (truncated): multiple entries describing unrelated changes across many components/pages

hallucinated_features.description: Modified `project_state.json` to track/describe an unrequested “Chrzty” (Baptisms) feature request and related architectural notes.
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goal explicitly says not to implement the new “Chrzty” section as part of this request; changing project tracking to focus on it is unrelated to the PDF layout adjustment.
evidence: project_state.json: summary and new_feature_requests include “Wdrożyć sekcję „Chrzty” ...” and architectural_notes about “Chrzty”
